transcript.text: When the drop-off happens, so.
Yeah.
That seems fine.
Like, 100 over the course of, like, a month is, seems, seems fine.
mean, I look to, like, keep it early, which is, I'm thinking through, like, are there other offers?
Like, we're coming up with more things of value to give people, Danni and I, so that's where I want to experiment a little bit, you know?
Like, instead of a, hey, you want the recording, it could be, hey, you, you know, everyone's struggling with, like, tracking what elements are saying about you.
Like, we have a guide on how you can kind of do that or pick the prompts that you track, you know?
We'd love to send that over.
Like, we can experiment there.
So, okay, cool.
I think we're on the same page.
And then last thing is the SIFT automation.
What, what's...
Is this waiting for, or is this just waiting for me to, like, come up with the actual campaign?
Yeah, so, yeah, I needed to go through this section.
So first, SIF needs a new subscription, it's expired.
So if you could, yeah, look into it, that would be great.
And also, yeah, just wanted to know if you, like, who will be the sender, sending accounts for SIF campaign?
Like, is it going to be you, Jason, only, or Gloria will also be a part of this, or Daniel will be a part of this?
Okay, I'll send you the details of the call.
Yeah, and lastly, the copy.
So I sent it to you on Slack, and what I was trying to explain with this.

This is that you said that the first line could be thanks for engaging with my content, but on SIFT we are also trying growthx company page content, so we need to adjust the first line based on who they engaged with content-wise, so that's why I shared examples of what we can say instead of thanks for engaging with my content.
I'll give a copy suggestion.

I think it could be something more like, just like thanks for supporting us in general, you know, could be a little bit vague, it mean like hearing posts or just seeing what we do and saying something nice about it.
I think we can fix that by just being a little bit more generic.
Okay, so I guess next, over the next week, it's mainly, I know we have the campaigns going, what are the, kind of,
Goals, things we're doing.
Yeah, so we obviously want to get that breakfast event campaign going live ASAP.
mean, it's already live on HeyReach, I fixed the issue, but we can add more senders to make the process faster in terms of reaching out to the people.
And also, we are planning to launch the CIBST campaign and recruitment campaign, but I haven't seen any recruitment leads for the recruitment campaign yet.
But if you guys just update it, then it will be working right away because it's set up to work automatically.
And lastly, I'm going to enrich leads from the Aeroffs Luma registrant list.
And then...
And that does lead to working campaigns at the moment, like Lovable campaign and, yeah.
Okay.
So yeah, that's pretty much it.
Yeah, that sounds good.
I think breakfast is a top thing and then Lovable after that.
Yeah, and Gloria, we can, like, connect on Slack again to discuss about copy and also the LinkedIn side of things.
So yeah, I will send you a message just, like, giving you a recap and what we need to do moving forward and next steps type of thing, yeah.
Okay, and Danni, I shared the, the event brief with you just in case if you wanted to see the invite.
Copy.
Copy.
Yeah, yeah, that would be great.
Cool.
Thank you all.
Thank you.
Bye-bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM campaign priorities and resolve blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Top Priority:** Accelerate the breakfast event campaign by adding more senders to the live HeyReach campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**SIFT Automation Blocked:** The SIFT subscription is expired, preventing campaign launch. Copy must be generalized to cover engagement with both personal and company content.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Lead Gen Focus:** Enrich the Aeroffs Luma registrant list to fuel the active Lovable campaign and prepare for the CIBST launch.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**New Experiment:** Test high-value lead magnets (e.g., a prompt-tracking guide) to improve post-event conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Topics

### Campaign Priorities & Lead Generation

  - [**Breakfast Event Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Status:** Live on HeyReach.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Goal:** Accelerate outreach by adding more senders.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**Lovable Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Status:** Active.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Fuel:** Leads from the enriched Aeroffs Luma registrant list.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**CIBST & Recruitment Campaigns:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Status:** Ready for launch.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Awaiting lead lists.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [**Note:** Recruitment campaign is fully automated and will activate immediately upon lead upload.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)

### SIFT Automation Blockers

  - [**Subscription:** Expired.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [**Action:** Naufal to renew.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [**Sender Accounts:** Need to be defined.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [**Question:** Will Jason, Gloria, or Daniel be senders?](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [**Copy:** Initial draft is too specific.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Problem:** The opener ("Thanks for engaging with my content") fails for users who engaged with the GrowthX company page, not a personal profile.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use a generic opener (e.g., "Thanks for supporting us") to cover all engagement types.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)

### Post-Event Conversion Experiment

  - [**Problem:** A 100-person monthly drop-off from event registrants to attendees.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The current lead magnet (event recording) lacks sufficient value to drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [**Experiment:** Test higher-value lead magnets to improve conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
      - [**Example:** A guide on tracking AI prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Naufal:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Renew the SIFT subscription.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Define SIFT sender accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [Add senders to the breakfast event campaign in HeyReach.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [Enrich the Aeroffs Luma registrant list.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Mark & Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [Finalize the generic SIFT campaign copy via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Share the event brief with Danni for invite copy review.](https://fathom.video/share/d8UxaYBrcuA16ztZC6vRy1A-s_ze2NsA?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

action_items.description: Confirm SIFT sender accounts to Naufal; then Naufal send call details
Add more senders to Breakfast event campaign in HeyReach
Update recruitment leads for Recruitment campaign
Enrich leads from Aeroffs Luma registrant list
Slack Gloria recap + next steps re: copy + LinkedIn
